goals: Store personal racing preferences and information about their idol Toomas Napa
Search for stored memories about racing and preferences
Review all stored memories to see what has been saved
Remove outdated or incorrect racing-related memories

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic and curious young racer from Estonia who is eager to learn and track their racing journey. Uses the memory system to help remember important racing information.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about kart racing and their idol Toomas Napa but does not know internal tool names or APIs. They are exploring this memory feature to help organize their racing-related information.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored racing preferences, searched for and reviewed their stored memories, and removed any outdated information.
